title: CRITICAL: live order qty->lots conversion ignores trade_contract_size + leverage gate validates weight-space not notional
source: Armed MT5-demo cycle 2026-05-29: placed a ~.19B-notional, ~12000x-leverage book (USDJPY 74 lots x 100k contract). Demo (virtual) -> flattened immediately; NO real capital. The armed-on-demo test caught it before live.
why: execution qty (weight*equity/price) is in base-units/oz/coins; MT5 volume is in LOTS = units/trade_contract_size. The lot-snapping snaps to volume_step but never divides by trade_contract_size, so FX (contract 100000), XAG (1000), XAU (100) orders were sent ~contract_size too large -> FX rejected (retcode 10019 NO_MONEY), metals/JPY filled grossly oversized (USDJPY ~.19B). The leverage gate did NOT catch it because it computed gross leverage in WEIGHT space (targets sum to 0.5) instead of from actual lot*contract_size*price notional vs equity.
value_rationale: HIGH: a deploy-blocking correctness+safety bug. Must be fixed (and the leverage gate must compute REAL notional) before ANY armed run, demo or live.
scope: Fix qty->lots: lots = target_units / trade_contract_size(symbol), then snap to volume_step; clamp volume_min/max. Per-symbol contract_size from mt5.symbol_info.
Fix the leverage gate to compute ACTUAL gross notional = sum(lots*contract_size*price)/equity and scale-down/block if > max_gross_leverage -- the real safety net.

Test: armed-path sim (mocked mt5 with realistic contract sizes) asserts resulting position notionals sum to ~max_gross_leverage*equity across FX/metals/crypto; and that a deliberate mis-conversion is caught/scaled by the gate.
Post-mortem note for Best-Tech: testing armed on the DEMO caught a .19B sizing bug before real capital.

history.reason: logged from armed demo cycle sizing-bug post-mortem
fix(execution): B0090 contract-size lot conversion + notional leverage gate; B0088 CMF full-universe
chore(coordination): demo shakeout live (durable service + 1-min risk monitor); B0090 fixed; armed book ~0.33x
contract-size lot conversion + notional leverage gate fixed & committed 535ce5b; live-validated on demo (no recurrence of the $1.19B sizing)
